This file includes (variable highlights):
Part C Benefit Package and Contract number
Diagnosis (ICD diagnosis)
HCPCS code
Date of service (line date)
NPI for line rendering physician
No payment information
Special considerations:
Many Medicare Advantage Plans offer extra coverage in addition to services covered under traditional fee-for-service Medicare (e.g., vision, hearing, dental, and/or health and wellness programs). Encounter data may include records for some
